objectives.title: Close the Bialystok-Minsk pocket
objectives.detail: OKH expects the frontier armies encircled and Minsk in German hands within a fortnight. A swift double envelopment, Herr Feldmarschall.

objectives.title: Seize Smolensk, the gate to Moscow
objectives.detail: The land bridge between the Dvina and the Dnieper must be forced and Smolensk taken before the Soviets can dig in.

objectives.title: Wheel south to take Gomel and shield the flank
objectives.detail: The Fuehrer wants the industrial south and the Pripyat flank cleared before any further drive east. Detach a panzer group to take Gomel. The panzer generals will protest that this squanders the run on Moscow - decide.

objectives.title: Take Bryansk and open the southern approach
objectives.detail: Secure Bryansk to anchor the right wing of the final advance on the capital.

objectives.title: Take Moscow before the winter closes
objectives.detail: Everything has led to this. Moscow must fall before the snows make a graveyard of the army group.
